title: Gravity, Gourds, & You
description: An unconventional way to automate melons and pumpkins via dripstone.
body:
## Overview

This mod adds a slightly kooky way to farm melons and pumpkins. Quick rundown:

- Pumpkins and melons no longer break when pushed by a piston. They also obey gravity.
- Upon falling on blocks like pointed dripstone, melons and pumpkins split into slices.
  - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) must be installed for pumpkins to drop pumpkin slices.
  - Large pumpkin slices from [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity) also break into slices. (Note that [Abnormals Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/abnormals-delight) must also be installed for the standard pumpkin-to-slices cutting board recipe!)
  - [1.21.1] Gourdnuts from [Abundant Atmosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/abundant-atmosphere) drop two pumpkin slices.

## Config
- Number of pumpkin slices dropped from pumpkins that fall on dripstone (default: 4)
- Chance of dropping extra pumpkin slices (default: 0)
- Number of extra pumpkin slices that would drop (default: 0)
- [1.19.2 & 1.21.1] Whether falling gourds deal damage to entities (default: true)

### Block Tag
Blocks with the block tag `gravity_gourds:pointy` will turn gourds into their sliced forms. By default, this just includes vanilla's pointed dripstone.

---
Requires **[Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)**. Optional compat with Farmer's Delight and Autumnity.

Credit for this concept goes to Freshah. Thanks Freshah!

Feel free to direct any suggestions and bugs to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/gravitygourds/issues)!
